2211490.name: Grav Factor
2211490.description:
Grav Factor is a built-for-VR game where you pilot a ship with 6DOF movement.

  • Built for VR, from day one. If you have VR motion controllers no other hardware is necessary!
  • Although it's built for VR motion controls, joysticks are supported!
  • Explore a dangerous underwater world
  • Accept a variety of missions to help or hinder humanity's remaining factions
  • Take on obstacle courses in each of the game's cities, testing your piloting skill
  • Collect new ships, weapons and upgrades as you progress through the game
2211490.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
